channel.title: BYOK on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in BYOK on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Bring your own language model key in VS Code now available
item.description:
Copilot Business and Enterprise users can now use bring your own language model key (BYOK) in Visual Studio Code. This lets teams use their own API keys to access supported models in VS Code.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Copilot CLI now supports BYOK and local models
item.description:
GitHub Copilot CLI now supports connecting your own model provider (BYOK) or using fully local models instead of GitHub-hosted model routing. The change gives CLI users more control over where models run and which providers they use.

  • Source: GitHub
